name: Energizing Linguine
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked chicken, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare linguine according to package directions, omitting salt. Drain and keep warm.
2. Heat margarine in a skillet over medium heat. Add sliced mushrooms and celery; cook until tender.
3. Stir in cornstarch and simmer for 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens slightly.
4. Gradually stir in chicken broth, white wine, lemon juice, thyme, hot pepper sauce, and shredded mozzarella cheese. Simmer gently, stirring occasionally, until the mixture is bubbly.
5. Add cooked chicken strips and chopped spinach to the skillet; cover and cook for 1 minute or until heated through.
6. Divide the linguine among serving plates and top with the mushroom sauce. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
